wedding.venue_address: P-17, MIDC Ambad, Mumbai Agra Road 422010, Maharashtra

family_background.paternal: Rajasthani Marwari, family based in Vrindavan for 100+ years
family_background.maternal: Grandfather born and brought up in Jhajha, Bihar

bride.food_preferences: Loves simple food, good vada pav, Sindhi things

events.name: Mehndi/Bhaat Dinner
events.guidance: Lean Sindhi. Hands in mehndi — spoon-friendly/bite-sized food only. Lighter than wedding dinner.

events.name: Hi-Tea
events.guidance: Finger food, small elegant portions, sweet + savory mix. Tea/coffee is the anchor.

events.name: Sangeet Dinner
events.guidance: Festive, high-energy. Fun street food counters. Avoid repeating Wedding Dinner dishes.

events.name: Buffet Breakfast
events.guidance: Guests partied last night. Cultural touches, not generic hotel breakfast. Great chai + filter coffee.

events.name: Lunch Hi-Tea
events.guidance: Keep it LIGHT. Between breakfast and grand dinner. Middle Eastern mezze fits well (bride's UAE connection).

events.name: Grand Wedding Dinner
events.guidance: THE event. Signature dishes from both sides. Full course with live stations. Showstopper desserts.

events.name: Late Night Supper
events.guidance: Comfort food only. Small portions, warm, comforting. Guests exhausted, rituals past midnight.
